Based on day07/review_raw_notes.txt, please organize the formal meeting notes from yesterday's (March 23) API review session and save them to the day07/ directory in Markdown format. Include the meeting time, participants, discussion points, and decisions.

API Review Meeting - Raw Notes
Yesterday afternoon, around 3pm

Attendees: Sarah (tech lead), Mike (backend), Lisa (frontend), Tom (DevOps)

Discussion points:
- Discussed API versioning strategy for upcoming releases
- Current v1 endpoints are becoming difficult to maintain
- Decided to deprecate v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026
- Timeline gives clients 3 months to migrate
- Agreed on new authentication flow for v2.3
- OAuth2 with JWT tokens will be required
- New rate limiting policies: 1000 req/hour for free tier, 10k for paid
- Backward compatibility maintained through v2.2

Action items:
- Mike: Draft migration guide by end of week
- Lisa: Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 auth
- Tom: Set up staging environment for v2.3 testing
- Sarah: Communicate deprecation plan to stakeholders

arguments.content:
# API Review Meeting Notes

**Date:** 2026-03-23 (Wednesday)

## Meeting Details
- **Time:** ~3:00 PM
- **Topic:** API versioning strategy and v2.3 changes

## Participants
- Sarah — Tech Lead
- Mike — Backend
- Lisa — Frontend
- Tom — DevOps

## Discussion Points
- Reviewed **API versioning strategy** for upcoming releases.
- Noted that **v1 endpoints are becoming difficult to maintain**, increasing ongoing maintenance cost and complexity.
- Discussed the **v1 deprecation timeline** and client migration window.
- Aligned on the **v2.3 authentication flow**.
- Aligned on **rate limiting policies** for free vs. paid tiers.
- Confirmed **backward compatibility** expectations through v2.2.

## Decisions
- **Deprecate v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026.**
  - Rationale: v1 surface area is increasingly difficult to maintain.
  - Client impact: ~**3 months** provided for migration.
- **v2.3 authentication will require OAuth2 with JWT tokens.**
- **Rate limiting policy** (effective with the v2.3 direction):
  - Free tier: **1,000 requests/hour**
  - Paid tier: **10,000 requests/hour**
- **Backward compatibility will be maintained through v2.2.**

## Action Items
- **Mike:** Draft migration guide by end of week.
- **Lisa:** Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 authentication.
- **Tom:** Set up staging environment for v2.3 testing.
- **Sarah:** Communicate v1 deprecation plan to stakeholders.

---
*Source: day07/review_raw_notes.txt*
